ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "endangered_status" TEXT /* Endangered status (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable, Least Concern) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species (e.g., Coral reefs, Open ocean) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., Protected, Unprotected) */,
  "ecological_importance" TEXT /* Ecological importance (e.g., Keystone species, Commercially important) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species (e.g., Carnivorous, Herbivorous) */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the species in centimeters */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landings" (
  "landing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being landed */,
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity that made the landing */,
  "landed_value" REAL /* Total value of the landed species */,
  "landings" REAL /* Weight of the landings in metric tons */,
  "observed_price" REAL /* Price observed for the landed species */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the landing record */,
  "fishing_method" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing method used */,
  "landing_location" TEXT /* Location of the landing (e.g., Port, City) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_fishing_method FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_method") REFERENCES fishing_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_fishing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_entity_id") REFERENCES fishing_entities ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_entities" (
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the fishing entity */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the fishing entity is registered */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the fishing entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing entity (e.g., Company, Cooperative) */,
  "vessel_count" INTEGER /* Number of vessels owned by the entity */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees working for the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value (e.g., 2007, 2008) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species for which the quota applies */,
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity subject to the quota */,
  "quota_amount" REAL /* Amount of the quota in metric tons */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the quota */,
  "quota_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the quota (e.g., Metric tons, Number of individuals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_quotas_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_quotas_fishing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_entity_id") REFERENCES fishing_entities ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species for tracking price trends */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the price record */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price observed for the species in the given year */,
  "price_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the price (e.g., US Dollars, Euros) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the fishing method (e.g., Trawling, Longlining) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fishing method */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the fishing method (e.g., High, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_habitat" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species associated with the habitat */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "habitat")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity being evaluated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the compliance evaluation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "infraction_details" TEXT /* Details of any infractions or violations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_fishing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_entity_id") REFERENCES fishing_entities ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing report */,
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity submitting the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "landings_report" TEXT /* Detailed landings report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_reports_fishing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_entity_id") REFERENCES fishing_entities ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Researcher, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_gear" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing gear */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear (e.g., Nets, Lines) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fishing gear */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_gear" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity associated with the gear */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing gear used by the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fisheries_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fisheries data record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species for which the data applies */,
  "fishing_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing entity that provided the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "catch_amount" REAL /* Amount of catch in metric tons */,
  "catch_value" REAL /* Value of the catch in US Dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fisheries_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fisheries_data_fishing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_entity_id") REFERENCES fishing_entities ("fishing_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logger" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logger_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
